title: Inconsistent column names
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(x INT, y TEXT);
SELECT a FROM (SELECT x AS a, y FROM t1);
CREATE TABLE t2 AS SELECT a FROM (SELECT x AS a, y FROM t1);
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 't2';
key_bug_features: Inconsistent column names between SELECT and CREATE TABLE AS
